LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_FMJ.label: .460 S&W Magnum (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_FMJ.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the fastest handgun cartridges ever designed.
LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_AP.label: .460 S&W Magnum (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_AP.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the fastest handgun cartridges ever designed.
LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_HP.label: .460 S&W Magnum (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_460SWMagnum_HP.description: Designed for big game hunting, this is one of the fastest handgun cartridges ever designed.
LanguageData.Bullet_460SWMagnum_FMJ.label: .460 Smith Wessen Magnum bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_460SWMagnum_AP.label: .460 Smith Wessen Magnum bullet (AP)
